name: Mocha Reserve
author: ImAsra
description: Catppuccin Mocha neumorphic theme. Cream and mauve smoke over deep navy-mauve.

1.0.5: Bug reported by Legislate3030 on github.
Fix: row controls (favorite/heart, star rating, bulk-select checkbox, preview) inside track rows can be clicked reliably again.
The press animation was scaling the whole row on :active, which shifted controls out from under the cursor mid-click and silently swallowed the click.
Fix: sidebar collapse button and queue resizer handle no longer shift out from under the cursor on press.
1.0.3: Fix: collapsed sidebar nav buttons are now square and icon-sized.
1.0.2: Fix: the album rail's prev/next arrows work again. The card shadow now gets room inside the rail instead of switching off its overflow, which had disabled the arrows.
1.0.1: Fix: allow album-card box-shadow glow to render above album cards (overflow: visible).
Add breathing room for first row of album cards.
Normalize star rating rendering (emoji SVG adjusted and background-size set to 12x12).
